headline: Willis: Food industry faces mounting risks and falling confidence in risk management in 2026
summary: LONDON, July 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Fears over food safety and health have risen sharply, with almost half of companies (45%) naming this among their biggest risks, up from 29% in 2024, amid growing concern over ultra-processed foods and rising litigation exposure. That’s according to the Global Food, Beverage and Agriculture Risk Report 2026, published today by Willis, a WTW business (NASDAQ: WTW).
